title: Infosys and Handelsblatt Media Group launch AI-powered Editorial Link Intelligence engine
detailed_summary: Infosys and Handelsblatt Media Group announced the launch of Editorial Link Intelligence, an AI-powered editorial recommendation engine developed exclusively for Handelsblatt and WirtschaftsWoche. The solution leverages Infosys Aster and was developed by Wongdoody, Infosys' human experience agency. It analyzes article content and metadata to recommend internal links, aiming to modernize editorial operations, improve workflow efficiency, enhance reader navigation, boost engagement, increase time spent on site, and support Handelsblatt and WirtschaftsWoche in delivering contextual digital journalism. The launch marks a milestone in Infosys' three-year collaboration with Handelsblatt as its official AI & Digital Innovation Partner.
